name: Olivier Pomel
background: Olivier Pomel is our co-founder and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and a member of our board of directors since our inception in 2010. Prior to founding Datadog, Mr. Pomel was a Vice President of Technology at Wireless Generation, a SaaS education company, until its acquisition by News Corp. Mr. Pomel holds an M.S. in Computer Science from the École Centrale Paris.
